problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of BDNF. BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
